label: Headline Quote · Portrait
description: White card with a bold headline at top, a pull quote in the middle, attribution + CTA at the bottom. Left-edge primary color accent bar. For event promos and fan testimonials.

slots.label: Bold headline at top
slots.example: Every Great Moment Deserves to Be Remembered

slots.label: Pull quote or supporting text
slots.example: Momentify transformed how we engage fans. Our post-event NPS jumped 28 points in one season.

slots.label: Attribution or date
slots.example: — Sarah Chen, VP Fan Experience, Pacific FC
